productDisplayName: Palm Tree Kids Boys Washed Blue Shorts
description: Composition Blue denim shorts made of 100% cotton, has a looped waistband with an elasticated back, a hook and zipper closure, two insert pockets on the sides, two patch pockets on the back with embroidered detailing on it and brand name embroidered on the right insert pocket on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water Wash with like colours Wash/dry inside out Use mild detergents Do not tumble dry Use warm iron Do not iron on decor Remove all detatchable accessories Get your little brat ready for the outdoors with this blue denim shorts from palm tree. The wide elasticated band gives a great Fit, while the cotton fabric keeps him feeling fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with tees and comfy footwear for a happy, casual outing with his pals.
